summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Architecture Modules: Tech Ops (Verticals, Models, Brands, Buyers), Demand (Forecasts, Dispatch Lots), and Quality Control (QC Checklists). All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows tested successfully.

issues: Minor console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for DialogContent' - accessibility warning in all Add dialogs

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby attribute (accessibility warning) - affects TechOps.js, Demand.js, Quality.js
seed_data_creation: Created test data: TEST_VERTICAL_001, TEST_MODEL_001, TEST_BUYER_001, TEST_BRAND_001, TEST forecasts and dispatch lots, TEST QC checklists (Surface Quality Check, Dimension Check)
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Architecture Modules fully tested. All 3 modules accessible from sidebar navigation. Tech Ops has 4 tabs (Verticals, Models, Brands, Buyers) with Add buttons. Demand has 2 tabs (Forecasts, Dispatch Lots) with Add buttons. Quality Control has 2 tabs (Pending QC, Checklists) with Add Checklist button. Backend APIs exclude MongoDB _id from responses correctly.

tech_ops_verticals_api.POST /api/verticals: PASS - Creates vertical with code, name, description

tech_ops_models_api.POST /api/models: PASS - Creates model with vertical_id, code, name

tech_ops_buyers_api.POST /api/buyers: PASS - Creates buyer with code, name, country, email

tech_ops_brands_api.POST /api/brands: PASS - Creates brand with code, name, buyer_id

demand_forecasts_api.POST /api/forecasts: PASS - Creates forecast with buyer_id, vertical_id, quantity, priority

demand_dispatch_lots_api.GET /api/dispatch-lots: PASS - Returns list of dispatch lots
demand_dispatch_lots_api.POST /api/dispatch-lots: PASS - Creates lot with sku_id, buyer_id, quantity, target_date

quality_checklists_api.GET /api/qc-checklists: PASS - Returns list of QC checklists
quality_checklists_api.POST /api/qc-checklists (MEASUREMENT): PASS - Creates measurement checklist with tolerance
quality_checklists_api.GET /api/qc-results: PASS - Returns empty list for nonexistent batch

frontend_tech_ops_ui.page_loads: PASS - Tech Ops page loads with 4 tabs
frontend_tech_ops_ui.verticals_tab: PASS - Shows verticals table with Code, Name, Description, Status
frontend_tech_ops_ui.add_vertical_dialog: PASS - Opens with Code, Name, Description fields
frontend_tech_ops_ui.add_model_dialog: PASS - Opens with Vertical dropdown, Code, Name fields
frontend_tech_ops_ui.add_brand_dialog: PASS - Opens with Code, Name, Buyer dropdown
frontend_tech_ops_ui.buyers_tab: PASS - Shows buyers table with Code, Name, Country, Email, Status
frontend_tech_ops_ui.add_buyer_dialog: PASS - Opens with Code, Name, Country, Contact Email fields

frontend_demand_ui.page_loads: PASS - Demand page loads with 2 tabs
frontend_demand_ui.forecasts_tab: PASS - Shows forecasts table with Code, Month, Buyer, Vertical, Quantity, Priority, Status, Actions
frontend_demand_ui.add_forecast_dialog: PASS - Opens with Buyer, Vertical, SKU, Forecast Month, Quantity, Priority fields
frontend_demand_ui.dispatch_lots_tab: PASS - Shows lots table with Lot Code, SKU, Buyer, Target Date, Required, Produced, QC Passed, Dispatched, Status
frontend_demand_ui.create_lot_dialog: PASS - Opens with SKU, Buyer, Required Quantity, Target Date, Priority fields

frontend_quality_ui.page_loads: PASS - Quality Control page loads with 2 tabs
frontend_quality_ui.pending_qc_tab: PASS - Shows batches pending QC (empty when no COMPLETED/QC_HOLD batches)
frontend_quality_ui.checklists_tab: PASS - Shows QC checklists table with Code, Name, Type, Expected Value, Priority, Mandatory
frontend_quality_ui.add_checklist_dialog: PASS - Opens with Name, Check Type, Description, Vertical, Expected Value, Priority fields
